title: strophostyles missouriensis
intro: Strophostyles missouriensis, also known as Missouri bean, is a perennial legume native to North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant has been reported to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating skin conditions. Herbal preparations of Strophostyles missouriensis include teas and infusions made from the leaves and roots, which can be used to soothe skin irritations and promote healing.
